sections.paragraph:
Original: קוּשׁיהוּ

Transliteration: qûshâyâhû

Phonetic: koo-shaw-yaw'-hoo

BDB Definition:

Kushaiah = "bow of Jehovah"
  1. father of Ethan the Merarite
    1. same as 'Kish' or 'Kishi'

Origin: from the pass part of H6983 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
